description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a long, slender barrel and a prominent wooden stock and foregrip, giving it a vintage appearance. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, contrasting with the lighter, polished wood elements. A large, round drum magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting high ammunition capacity. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights along the top of the barrel for aiming. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly visible, as are the ergonomic contours of the wooden grip and stock. The overall build is robust, with a combination of wood and metal materials that evoke early to mid-20th-century firearm aesthetics.
description: A vintage-style rifle with a long metal barrel, wooden stock and foregrip, and a large drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular drum magazine and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the wooden stock and foregrip, and the drum magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the round shape of the drum magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the wooden components, metal receiver, and the length of the rifle.
